_comment: Curated internet-radio station catalog for the web UI tap-to-add (slice 8). The Pi ships CBC Radio 1 Calgary + CKUA as pre-populated favorites (see src/media.rs::DEFAULT_FAVORITES); this catalog offers a broader set for tap-to-add. Stream URLs MUST be re-verified before each release (see docs/release-checklist.md).

stations.name: CKUA
stations.url: BROKEN: https://stream.ckua.com:8000/ckua-128k-mp3 (verify before re-adding; TuneIn stream also intermittent)

stations.name: CKUA Jazz
stations.url: BROKEN: CKUA streams currently down (verify before re-adding)
